channel.title: Simon's Newsletter Digest
channel.description: Auto-summarised newsletter entries, powered by Claude Haiku

item.title: 【23Mar Patreon加時】戰火持續點自保？《末日聖母號》今年第一部不可不看的電影！ [2/2]
item.author: Victor Ng Ming Tak <bingo@patreon.com>
item.description: Patreon is implementing a technical change where emails from this creator (Victor Ng Ming Tak) will originate from a new sender address 'living_at_the_present@creator.patreon.com' starting soon, as part of improvements to how creator emails appear in subscriber inboxes.
item.keywords: Patreon sender address change, email infrastructure update, new creator email domain, inbox deliverability improvement

item.title: 【23Mar Patreon加時】戰火持續點自保？《末日聖母號》今年第一部不可不看的電影！ [1/2]
item.author: Victor Ng Ming Tak <bingo@patreon.com>
item.description: A Patreon newsletter post titled '【23Mar Patreon加時】戰火持續點自保？《末日聖母號》今年第一部不可不看的電影!' (March 23 Patreon Extended - Continued Warfare Self-Preservation? 'Doomsday Mother Ship' - This Year's Must-Watch Film!) discusses a film called 'Doomsday Mother Ship' or similar title in Chinese, positioned as a significant movie release for the year in the context of ongoing conflict.
item.keywords: Doomsday Mother Ship film, 2026 movie release, war/conflict themes, Patreon exclusive content, film review/recommendation

item.title: 本周美股前瞻｜特朗普暫停攻擊伊朗電廠五日 油價單日瀉一成 道指飆升900點 四隻本周當炒股（3月23日） [2/2]
item.author: MHK TECH <bingo@patreon.com>
item.description: Four stocks recommended on March 16 showed mixed performance with an average decline of 2.41%, underperforming the Nasdaq which fell 0.75% (underperformance of 1.66 percentage points). Consolidated Water (CWCO) was the worst performer, plunging 11.99% from $35.28 to $31.05 with minimal rebound.
item.keywords: stock performance review, Consolidated Water CWCO, underperformance 1.66%, market analysis, technical breakdown

item.title: 本周美股前瞻｜特朗普暫停攻擊伊朗電廠五日 油價單日瀉一成 道指飆升900點 四隻本周當炒股（3月23日） [1/2]
item.author: MHK TECH <bingo@patreon.com>
item.description: Trump paused attacks on Iran power plants for five days, causing oil prices to drop 10% in a single day. The Dow Jones index surged 900 points in response to this geopolitical development. The email previews four stock recommendations for the week of March 23, 2026.
item.keywords: Trump Iran pause, oil price drop 10%, Dow Jones 900 points, geopolitical markets, stock recommendations

item.title: 後「股神」巴菲特年代第一擊：入股Tokio Marine預示戰火連綿？
item.author: 中環十一少 <bingo@patreon.com>
item.description: Berkshire Hathaway has invested $1.8 billion to acquire a 2.5% stake in Tokio Marine, a major Japanese insurance company. This investment marks a significant move in what appears to be a new era following Warren Buffett's tenure as the company's lead investor.
item.keywords: Berkshire Hathaway, Tokio Marine, 1.8 billion USD investment, 2.5% stake, Japanese insurance, Warren Buffett
